text:
The actor brought 16-year-old Sunday Rose with her to the Olympics

Nicole Kidmanis clearly off to a fashionable start at theParis 2024 Olympics—and she’s even getting a little style boost from her 16-year-old daughter, Sunday Rose.

The mother-daughter duo hit the red carpet on Monday, at an Omega event in Paris. (Kidman is a brand ambassador for the luxury timepiece company.) For the occasion, the two showed out in different takes on monochromatic dressing.

Kidman selected a sleek all-white set from Valentino, composed of an ultra-cropped blouse that offered a glimpse of midriff and a billowing midi skirt (with! pockets!). TheBig Little Liesstar kept things fairly simple with the rest of her outfit, adding some white slingback pumps from Charles & Keith and—of course—a shiny Omega watch in rose gold.

As for Sunday, the teen looked ready for business in a refined co-ord that featured a cropped button-up vest and wide-leg pants, both pieces made of a slate gray fabric. For some extra oomph, she added strappy metallic silver sandals and some gold jewelry—including her own Omega timepiece.

Kidman has made theOlympicsa family affair, arriving in Paris with husband Keith Urban and their other daughter, 13-year-old Faith Margaret.

In an interview forHarper’s Bazaar’s October 2021 cover story, the actor opened up about her loving family dynamic with Urban, whom she married in 2006.

“We’re always working through stuff, but it’s very much love-based, so there’s an enormous amount of give and take,” she said. “I want him to have the best life he can have, and he responds the same way. … We really love parenting together.”

title: Nicole Kidman and Her Teen Daughter Present Two Very Different Takes on Monochrome Dressing
